description_long: This storage locker features a rectangular, box-like compartment with a sloped, dark-colored roof and a prominent front-facing door. The main body is attached to a long, segmented, gray panel that likely serves as a mounting or support structure, giving the object a wide horizontal footprint. The front door displays a colorful sticker or label, and there is a visible handle for opening the compartment. The locker appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with a utilitarian design suitable for outdoor or semi-public environments. The side views reveal the depth of the compartment and the overhanging roof, which may provide some weather protection. The overall appearance suggests durability and security, making it ideal for storing personal or maintenance items in urban settings.
description: A rectangular metal storage locker with a sloped roof, mounted on a wide gray panel, featuring a front door with a handle and a colorful label.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the locker and the overhanging sloped roof, with the wide gray panel extending horizontally.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full width of the segmented gray panel and the top of the locker roof barely visible above it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the locker compartment, sloped roof, and a partial view of the front door with a label.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main access door with a handle and a colorful sticker, as well as the full width of the supporting gray panel.
